expectations.text: main-page-file: Creates pages/Projects___WebApp.md with triple-underscore namespace
page-tags-property: Main page has tags:: property with project and active
page-status-property: Main page has status:: in-progress property
double-colon-props: Properties use double-colon syntax (key:: value), not single colon
expectations.evidence: All properties use :: syntax: tags::, status::

expectations.text: page-props-no-bullet: Page-level properties at file top are NOT prefixed with '- '
subpage-links: Main page links to sub-pages using [[Projects/WebApp/Architecture]] syntax
outliner-syntax: All content blocks (non-property lines) start with '- ' bullet prefix
expectations.evidence: All content lines (4-9) start with '- ' and use 2-space indentation for nesting.

expectations.text: tasks-with-priorities: Tasks page has tasks with different priority levels [#A], [#B], [#C]
expectations.evidence: Tasks page lines 4-6: NOW [#A], LATER [#B], LATER [#C]
